• English grammar fluency for real talk
English grammar fluency for real talk. Contractions (I'm, we'll, shouldn't), conjunctions (and/but/because/although), gerunds and participles (-ing forms), strong verbs over weak ones, concrete nouns, and interpersonal communication — greetings, empathy, clarity, turn-taking.

You asked: github brain isolation policy

• GitHub brain isolation
This is the GitHub brain — a read-only mirror of Hostess 7 doctrine and corpus. It answers the same way but lives in docs/github-brain on Pages. Public chat never writes to cache/fieldstorage/brain, brain/state, or superintel. Sovereign brain stays on loopback after ./Hostess7.sh boot.
